title: Serverside Anticheat
description: The SS Anti-Cheat Stack is a lightweight, server-side defense suite designed specifically for Minecraft 1.21.11. Built on the high-performance foundations of the SS Stack methodology.
body:
## 🛡️ SS Anti-Cheat Stack (1.21.11) **✨ Lightweight, Modular Server Security ✨** The **SS Anti-Cheat Stack** is a precision-tuned security suite for **1.21.11**, designed to protect your server from competitive advantages and malicious exploits without sacrificing performance. This 100% server-side collection ensures fair play while maintaining the high TPS standards of the **SS Stack** philosophy. --- ## 🛠️ Security Deep-Dive & Configs Click below to see how each module works and where to find its settings in your `/config` folder.
💎 Resource Protection (Anti-Xray) Ore exploitation is the most common way players ruin a server economy. * **How it works:** Uses server-side obfuscation to hide ores until they are actually visible. * **Config file:** `antixray.json` 📂 * **Pro-Tip:** ||Use "Mode 2" in the config to generate fake ores that confuse cheaters even more!|| 🕵️
🕊️ Movement & Camera (AntiFly/Freecam) Stop players from flying or spying through solid blocks. * **How it works:** Monitors player physics and camera offsets to ensure they aren't bypassing vanilla limits. * **Config files:** `antifly.json` and `antifreecam.json` 📂 * **Pro-Tip:** ||If players with high ping are getting kicked, increase the "threshold" values in these configs to be more lenient.|| 🐎
💰 Economy & Dupe Prevention (Panda) Protect the integrity of your players' hard work. * **How it works:** Hardens game logic against item duplication via menus, entities, or pistons. * **Config file:** `panda-anti-dupe.json` 📂 * **Pro-Tip:** ||The mod automatically blocks most 1.21.11 dupe methods by default—no manual setup needed!|| ✨
🕵️ Exploit & Crash Defense Keep the server online and safe from malicious "crashers." * **How it works:** Scrubs incoming packets for malicious payloads or data floods. * **Config file:** `panda-anti-exploit.json` 📂 * **Pro-Tip:** ||Check the logs in this config to see who is sending suspicious packets to your server.|| 📝
⚙️ Core Logic (MTS Anticheat) The foundational layer for movement and action validation. * **How it works:** Provides the baseline checks for combat reach and basic speed modifications. * **Config file:** `mts-anticheat.properties` 📂
--- ## 📋 Technical Specs * **Mod Loader:** ⚙️ **Fabric** * **Version:** 🎯 **1.21.11** * **Requirement:** **Server-Side Only** (Players do not need to install this!). * **Compatibility:** Built to work perfectly alongside the **SS Optimization Stack**. --- **SS Stack | Shielding Your Community** 🛡️🚀
